overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The player approaches and circles robotic security drones in an open plaza surrounded by neon-lit buildings and palm trees, then continues through a commercial pedestrian zone with outdoor shops and NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza with reflective water features beneath elevated walkways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza, approaching the open area ahead

entered.detail: shallow rectangular pools reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
multi-story building with illuminated glass facades and orange structural elements
enclosed walkway bridge connecting buildings above the plaza level
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza with reflective water pools on the ground. The player walks forward beneath an elevated pedestrian bridge, with a glass office complex visible to the left displaying neon signage. The environment is artificially lit with a cool blue tone, and the space feels semi-enclosed by surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with security drones and cylindrical advertising tower

events.description: exits covered plaza into open area with visible dusk sky and robotic enemies
approaches two stationary security drones armed with weapons
begins circling around the security drones while maintaining distance

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching and circling the robotic drones while observing their behavior

notable_agents.action: security drone standing guard with weapon raised, tracking the player's movement
second security drone positioned nearby, also armed and stationary

entered.detail: humanoid robotic combat unit with glowing blue accents and mounted weapons
rounded multi-level structure covered with digital screens and neon signage
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky
darkening blue sky with orange horizon gradient visible above the city

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered plaza into an open area at dusk, immediately encountering two armed security drones. The camera circles around the stationary robots while revealing a cylindrical advertising tower and palm trees against the darkening sky. The glass office complex recedes into the background as the player focuses on the robotic enemies in the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with outdoor dining and shops

events.description: moves away from drone area into commercial zone with shops and pedestrians
navigates through scattered pedestrians walking in various directions

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial district, passing by outdoor cafes and pedestrian NPCs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza carrying items

entered.detail: ground-level shops with illuminated entrances and merchandise displays
white patio umbrellas shading outdoor seating areas for restaurants
massive vertical screen displaying advertisements with bright neon colors

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the robotic enemies behind and enters a bustling commercial pedestrian area with outdoor dining under white umbrellas. Various NPC pedestrians walk through the plaza as the player passes by shop fronts and large digital billboards. The palm trees now line the left side of the frame as the camera moves deeper into the neon-lit commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cool, semi-enclosed urban plaza into a vibrant, open-air commercial district at dusk. It begins beneath an elevated pedestrian bridge, moving across reflective water pools beside a glass office complex illuminated by blue neon signage. As the camera emerges from the covered area into the open air, the scene shifts to a wider plaza where the player circles two stationary armed security drones beneath a darkening sky and a cylindrical advertising tower. The camera then leaves the robots behind, transitioning into a bustling pedestrian zone filled with NPCs and outdoor dining under white umbrellas. Finally, the movement carries the viewer deeper into the neon-lit district, passing digital billboards and palm trees that line the edge of the commercial thoroughfare.
